## 💎 Executive Summary

### Recommended Architecture

```mermaid
flowchart TB
    User["\U0001F464 Users"] --> FD["\U0001F6E1\uFE0F Front Door / CDN"]

    App --> DB[("\U0001F5C4\uFE0F Database")]

        KV

    end

    subgraph Data

        Storage
    end
```
